headline: Exposure to chemicals at work Preparation Checklist — Riverton
articleBody:
Exposure to chemicals at work Preparation Checklist for Riverton Clients

Before your Exposure to chemicals at work appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
